description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a rectangular fence, featuring a low, sprawling layout with multiple roof sections. The structure is composed of several interconnected volumes, each with a flat or gently sloped roof, and is accented by a driveway and a small garage or carport on one side. The property includes landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs, providing greenery around the main building. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a modern, informal appearance. The exterior is finished in a muted gray color, with the roof and walls sharing a similar tone. The overall design suggests a contemporary ranch or modern bungalow style, optimized for suburban or urban neighborhood settings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, gray exterior, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a fence. Features include a driveway, garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entrance, driveway, and garage, with the fence and landscaping visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a cluster of trees near the entrance, with the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional roof sections, and more of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main living areas, more windows, and the landscaped yard within the fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
